Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the variant leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when followed by SW-Reviewer Declined versus when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer No Response in variants with repeated reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time for SW-AE Assign Reviewers to be completed in cases that eventually reach SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to those ending in SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants involving multiple occurrences of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Minimum time between the first and last occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers within a single case before SW-Reviewer Agreed is recorded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Unavailable in high-complexity variants with frequent editor reassignments
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after the final execution of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in each case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Cycle time of SW-AE Assign Reviewers when immediately preceded by SW-Reviewer Selection is now due versus when preceded by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due occurs

Name: Time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and the subsequent SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases with cascading reviewer declines
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time from the initial SW-AE Assign Reviewers to the eventual SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include Assign a Different Editor
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time for SW-AE Assign Reviewers to result in a successful SW-Reviewer Agreed without intermediate declines or reminders
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that bypass immediate EIC decisions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'
